description: Create a markdownlint-cli2 configuration file that extends the shared ../../.markdownlint-cli2.yaml file and explicitly enables the no-trailing-spaces rule. Place this config under a top‑level "config" key as shown, so that markdownlint-cli2 will inherit all other rules from the parent file while enforcing no trailing spaces. This file can then be referenced by CI jobs or local lint runs to ensure consistent markdown style.
